<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count)  / (Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$DPS2$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 450; 150; 800; 3750; 12000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ; 0
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Trigger Finger; Field Training; Gilded Gear; Maximum Potential
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 5523192002; 5523193619; 5523195646; 5523196519
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$FREF$ = <ref name=firerate>Firerate only applies to the burst and is not the time between bursts.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)).</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Firerate$FREF$ !! Cooldown !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 4 || 0.15 || 0.35 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 4 || 0.125 || 0.25 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 5 || 0.125 || 0.25 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || N/A || 0.125 || 0 || 22 || $DPS2$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || N/A || 0.125 || 0 || 22 || $DPS2$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
